/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/tests/raft_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/persister.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/rpc/labrpc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/raft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/raft_tests.dir/src/helper.cpp.o -o raft_tests  /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a /usr/local/lib/libgtest_main.a -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a
